title: Better Mace PvP
description: This Texture Pack Makes Your Experience with Mace PvP Better!
body:
This Resource Pack Makes Your Experience with Mace PvP Better! AND It's Near Vanilla!
This Adds :

- **Smaller Shield & Low Shield**
  
- **Smaller Totem & Small Totem Pop**
  
- **Low & Unobtrusive Fire**
  
- **Smaller Chestplate**
  
- **Smaller Elytra**
  
- **Smaller Ender Pearl**
  
- **Smaller Wind Charge**
  
- **Smaller Food**
  
- **No Eating Particles**
  
- **Unobtrusive Hit Particles**
  
- **Unobtrusive Wind Gust**
  
- **Unobtrusive Pumpkin Blur**
  
- **Unobtrusive Totem Pop Particles**
  
- **CM ( Custom Maces )**
  
- **Red Density Mace**
  
- **Blue Breach Mace**
  
- **Highlighted Cobwebs**

- **Invisible Elytra ( **Only with the invisible elytra version of the pack.** )**

-Note :

**This Resource Pack is just for better experience in mace pvp.**

-Credits:
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/

For Smaller Food.
